NCT04191499.group: HR+/HER2- PIK3CA-mut endocrine-resistant 1L mBC, inavolisib + palbociclib + fulvestrant vs placebo + palbociclib + fulvestrant (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: Investigator-assessed progression-free survival (primary; HR vs placebo arm)
Confirmed objective response rate in measurable disease (RR vs placebo arm)

NCT04191499.snippet: Source: Jhaveri KL et al. N Engl J Med 2024;391:1280-1290 (INAVO120).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria~* Confirmed diagnosis of HR+/HER2- breast cancer~* Metastatic or locally advanced disease not amenable to curative therapy~* Progression of disease during adjuvant endocrine treatment or within 12 months of completing adjuvant endocrine therapy with an aromatase inhibitor or tamoxifen~* Receiving LHRH agonist therapy for at least 2 weeks prior to Day 1 of Cycle 1 if pre/peri-menopausal~* Confirmation of biomarker eligibility (detection of specified mutation(s) of PIK3CA via s...

title: RapidMeta Oncology | Inavolisib + Palbociclib + Fulvestrant in PIK3CA-Mutated HR+/HER2- Advanced BC v1.0
